example: A smartphone is the most commonly used device today.
I use my smartphone for everything.
We need the internet to access information quickly.
There are apps for almost everything now.
Facebook and Instagram are popular social networks.
I downloaded the new app on my phone.
We live in a digital age.
Companies collect a lot of user data.
Too much screen time is bad for your eyes.
I study online during the pandemic.
Google is the most popular search engine.
Always use a strong password for your accounts.
Remember to update your software regularly.
